note: DRAFT source register (OUTCOME_BACKLOG.md task S-011), produced from a LegalOps interactive research pass on 2026-07-21. This is NOT a final legal clearance. Per OUTCOME_BACKLOG.md S-012C, only Human/counsel may accept source-use risk; every entry below stays a recommendation until a corresponding Human/counsel sign-off record exists. No entry here may feed a production collection pipeline yet.

entries.description: An individual concept-cafe/girls-bar store's own official website.
entries.terms_reference: none published (store sites in this industry typically carry no explicit reuse ToS); treated as unverifiable rather than permissive
entries.decision_basis: Factual data (name, address, hours, price) is not copyrightable. Only the site's expressive elements (photos, descriptive copy) are protected, so extracting facts and writing original descriptions is low-risk. Absence of published terms is not treated as blanket permission.
conditions: record facts in original wording, never copy descriptive text verbatim
do not copy or rehost photos
do not collect any cast (キャスト) name, photo, or other cast-identifying field
store source_url and retrieved_at on every field captured
entries.stop_method: remove store from allowlist / source register entry deprecated

entries.description: An individual store's own official social media account (X/Instagram/LINE etc.).
entries.terms_reference: platform ToS governs the account holder's own posting, not third-party read access to public posts; not independently re-verified per platform in this draft
entries.decision_basis: Same facts-not-copyrightable basis as store-official-website. Treated identically for the purposes of this register.
conditions: facts only (hours/status/price changes), never repost images or copy caption text verbatim
do not collect any cast-identifying field even if visible in a post
record source_url and retrieved_at per captured fact
entries.stop_method: remove store from allowlist / source register entry deprecated

entries.description: General web search, used to locate a store's own official URL, and (per the 2026-07-21 census-pivot amendment) to compile a bare name+area existence census -- not used as a content source itself in either case.
entries.terms_reference: not applicable -- used for URL discovery and name-only census, no content extracted from search results
entries.decision_basis: Using search to find a primary source URL, or to notice a store's bare name+existence, carries no meaningful reuse risk as long as (a) no snippet text/description is copied into a record beyond the name itself, and (b) the name list is compiled from varied general search queries rather than by systematically paging through one aggregator's own area listing -- the latter would extract the substantial value of that aggregator's compilation (selection/curation), which is exactly the database-right/編集著作物 concern the deny entries below target, even though each individual captured fact (a name) is not itself protectable.
conditions: URL discovery: use the found URL as the acquisition_method=official-site-direct-visit / official-sns-direct-visit source; never copy search-result snippet text into a store-artifact field
name census: source names via varied general web-search queries only, never by systematically paging/crawling one aggregator's full area listing to enumerate it
name census: no single source (aggregator or otherwise) may account for most names captured in an area's census -- density should look organically mixed, not derived from one site

name census: capture the name and area/station only -- no tagline, category, description, address, hours, or price from a listing page; those require independent verification via the store's own official source before being recorded at all
name census: never report or imply a completeness/coverage claim referencing a specific competitor site's own listing
entries.downstream_use: URL discovery step preceding a store-official-website/store-official-sns capture; and bare name+area census rows (tools/store_collector/census.py) pending enrichment
entries.stop_method: not applicable (no persistent connection to disable)

entries.description: Third-party listing aggregator (named competitor in Business Strategy.md).
entries.terms_reference: not verified in this draft; excluded on principle regardless of specific terms
entries.decision_basis: Compiled/curated listing data (this competitor's own aggregation of many stores) likely carries database-right/編集著作物 protection beyond the underlying facts. Business Strategy.md section 16/OUTCOME_BACKLOG.md section 3.3 already exclude competitor sites as a data source on principle.
